title: BROAD STREET REALTY INC. APPOINTS DONNA BRANDIN TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS
text: BETHESDA, Md., March 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Broad Street Realty, Inc. (OTCQX: BRST), a fully integrated and self-managed publicly owned real estate company uniquely focused on Essential grocery anchored and mixed-use assets, announces the appointment of Donna Brandin as a member of Board of Directors effective immediately.

title: Sustainable Living Innovations Announces Closing of Fundraising Round
text: SEATTLE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today Sustainable Living Innovations (SLI) announced that it has closed its Accelerated Growth fundraising round with approximately $53 million of corporate equity raised from existing and new investors. The round closed January 7, 2022. Investors in the company include Goldman Sachs, Equity Residential, The Hunt Companies, strategic partners and developers, and many high-net-worth individuals and leading family offices. “We are grateful for the support of our investor

title: Equity Residential to Participate in 2022 Citi Global Property CEO Conference
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today announced that members of the Company's senior management team, including the Company's President and CEO, Mark J. Parrell, will participate in a roundtable discussion at the 2022 Citi Global Property CEO Conference on Monday, March 7, 2022 at 8:15 a.m. ET. The event will be web cast live.
